Ex-Parte Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-31-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk Karissa Shaw, Reporter Susan Lee. (613)

Appearances:
Patricia McColm appearing In Propria Persona.

This matter comes on calendar for plaintiff's "Ex Parte Application for Administrative Order for Replacement Judge, Rescheduling Discovery Matters and for Assignment of Judge to Hear Motion to Vacate Void Discovery Order Issued by Disqualified Commissioner; Objection to Defendant's Ex-Parte Communication with Court".

As soon as Ms. McColm arrived in Department 613, she stated that Judge Goldsmith was disqualified and could not hear her application. She demanded that Judge Goldsmith appear immediately and transfer her matter to another department. The clerk informed her that the Judge was currently in a meeting with one of the research attorneys and that her matter would be heard as soon as possible.

Upon request from Ms. McColm, the clerk called the Judge to find out the status of her application and how much longer she would have to wait. The Judge informed the clerk that he was still waiting for the paperwork and case file from Department 206.

Although Ms. McColm was informed by the clerk that her matter would be heard as soon as Judge Goldsmith had reviewed her paperwork, she said that Judge Goldsmith was disqualified and left the courtroom.

At 3:15 p.m., Ms. McColm returned to Department 613 and informed the clerk that she is withdrawing her ex-parte application because Judge Goldsmith is disqualified.
